# Ningbo Yinrui Biomedical Instruments Co., Ltd

> Manufacturer of the CarryOn portable PCR analyzer — palm-sized, battery-powered molecular diagnostics for veterinary clinics, pathogen detection, and food safety testing.

## Products

### CarryOn Portable PCR Analyzer
- [CarryOn Detection Device](/en/products/carryon-device/): Handheld, battery-powered real-time fluorescence PCR analyzer. 2.0kg, 5-color fluorescence, <60 min results, 3.5h battery life. CE and ISO13485 certified.

### Test Chips — Canine Diagnostics
- [Canine CDV-CPV-CCoV Triple Test](/en/products/test-chips/canine-triple-screening): Routine screening for distemper, parvovirus, and coronavirus
- [Canine CPIV-CAV-CIV Respiratory Triple Test](/en/products/test-chips/canine-triple-respiratory): Respiratory symptom screening — parainfluenza, adenovirus, influenza
- [Canine Babesia-Ehrlichia-Leptospira Triple Test](/en/products/test-chips/canine-tick-borne): Tick-borne disease screening

### Test Chips — Feline Diagnostics
- [Feline FHV-FCV-Mycoplasma Triple Test](/en/products/test-chips/feline-triple-respiratory): Upper respiratory infection screening
- [Feline FeLV-FIV-FPV Screening Triple Test](/en/products/test-chips/feline-triple-screening): Leukemia, immunodeficiency, panleukopenia screening

### Test Chips — Pathogen Detection
- [Influenza A/B + SARS-CoV-2 Triple Test](/en/products/test-chips/influenza-covid-triple): Respiratory symptom triage
- [Mycoplasma + RSV + Adenovirus Triple Test](/en/products/test-chips/respiratory-pathogen-triple): Respiratory pathogen panel
- [Chlamydia + Ureaplasma + Gonorrhea STI Triple Test](/en/products/test-chips/sti-triple-test): Point-of-care STI screening
- [African Swine Fever Test](/en/products/test-chips/african-swine-fever): Field-deployable ASF detection for livestock
- [Porcine PRRSV (Blue Ear) Test](/en/products/test-chips/prrsv-test): Swine herd health monitoring

### Test Chips — Meat Species Identification
- [Beef-Pork-Chicken-Duck Quad Test](/en/products/test-chips/meat-beef-pork-chicken-duck): Food safety and Halal/Kosher compliance
- [Lamb-Pork-Chicken-Duck Quad Test](/en/products/test-chips/meat-lamb-pork-chicken-duck): Lamb adulteration detection
- [Donkey-Horse-Pork-Duck Quad Test](/en/products/test-chips/meat-donkey-horse-pork-duck): Cross-border meat fraud detection

### Accessories
- [Accessories & Consumables](/en/products/accessories/): Sampling swabs, transport tubes, consumables

## Technology
- [Microfluidic PCR Technology](/en/technology/): Closed-system nucleic acid amplification with microfluidic chip technology
- How it works: Load sample -> Insert chip -> Auto extraction, purification & PCR -> Read result in 40 min
- Sensitivity: 50 copies/test, CV <= 3% reproducibility

## About
- Company: Ningbo Yinrui Biomedical Instruments Co., Ltd (Yinrui Bio)
- Founded: June 2018 in Cixi, Zhejiang, China
- Founder: Dr. Yu Jun — NYU Biomedical PhD, BGI (Beijing Genomics Institute) co-founder
- Employees: 69 (including 6 PhDs, 12 Masters)
- Facility: ~3,000m2 laboratory + GMP workshops
- IP: 62 patents, 12 design patents, 6 software copyrights
- Certifications: CE (device + reagents), ISO13485, National High-Tech Enterprise
- Contact: WhatsApp +86 182-6866-1068

## Terminology
- CarryOn = portable PCR = point-of-care PCR = handheld qPCR
- Microfluidic chip = test chip = PCR cartridge = diagnostic chip
- Veterinary PCR = vet diagnostics = animal disease testing
- Meat species identification = meat adulteration testing = food DNA testing
